parsed.production_notes: The video relies entirely on AI-generated imagery. The woman's face is unnaturally static with a fixed smile and artificial lip-sync, while the robot is a clear AI generation. The fire and hand movements are simple looping animations.

characters.appearance: Female-presenting humanoid robot with a white and silver metallic body, visible mechanical joints, and bright blue eyes. She has a smooth, sculpted face and wears a small black headset.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing; features a white and silver metallic robotic casing.

characters.appearance: Indian female in her late 20s, medium build, brown complexion, dark hair tied back. She has a bright, constant smile.
characters.wardrobe: Pink short-sleeved blouse and a black saree decorated with pink floral patterns.
characters.demeanor: Cheerful, eager to learn, and inquisitive.

scenes.setting: Split setting: Top is a traditional Indian living room with wooden furniture and warm lighting. Bottom is an outdoor cooking area with a mud stove and a plain grey wall.

panels.panel_visual_description: A female-presenting humanoid robot sits cross-legged on a patterned rug in a warmly lit room. The robot has a white and silver metallic body with visible mechanical joints and bright blue eyes. She wears a small black headset over her ears. The background features a traditional Indian living room with wooden furniture, patterned cushions, and framed pictures on the wall. The lighting is soft and natural, highlighting the glossy finish of the robot's casing. The robot maintains a calm, forward-facing posture throughout the shot. The framing is a medium shot, capturing the robot from the waist up.

An Indian woman sits outdoors, cooking on a traditional wood-fired mud stove. She is wearing a pink short-sleeved blouse and a black saree decorated with pink floral patterns. She holds a flat pan with her right hand, cooking a round flatbread over the open flame. Smoke gently rises from the fire, adding atmosphere to the scene. The woman has a cheerful expression with a constant, bright smile directed at the camera. The background consists of a plain, light grey textured wall. The camera angle is a medium shot, focusing on the woman and her cooking activity.

scenes.visual_description: The scene is a split-screen layout with a horizontal division. The top half features Character A, an AI robot, sitting in a traditional living room setting. The bottom half shows Character B, a human woman, cooking on a mud stove outdoors. Large, bold text overlays in Telugu and English appear dynamically in the center of the screen, translating the spoken dialogue. Animated graphics, such as a clock and a coin, occasionally pop up over the center dividing line. The overall visual effect contrasts futuristic AI with traditional daily life.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ఏం చేస్తున్నారు? [What are you doing?]

Character B says: ఆ రొట్టెలు making. [Making rotis.]

Character A says: హహహ రొట్టెలు making కాదు, "i am making rotis" అనాలి. [Hahaha not making rotis, you should say "I am making rotis".]

Character B says: నాకు english నేర్పిస్తావా? [Will you teach me English?]

Character A says: తప్పకుండా! రోజు నాతో 15 నిమిషాలు practice చేస్తూ త్వరగా english నేర్చుకోవచ్చు. [Certainly! By practicing with me for 15 minutes daily, you can learn English quickly.]

Character B says: కానీ నా దగ్గర fees కట్టడానికి డబ్బు లేదు. [But I don't have money to pay fees.]

Character A says: కంగారు పడకండి. మీరు కేవలం ఒక్క రూపాయి తో మొదలుపెట్టొచ్చు. [Don't worry. You can start with just one rupee.]

Character B says: శుభం. ఎలా join అవ్వాలి? [Great. How to join?]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ఏం చేస్తున్నారు? (What are you doing?)
ఆ రొట్టెలు making (Making rotis)
hahaha రొట్టెలు (hahaha rotis)
"i am making rotis" అనాలి. (you should say "i am making rotis".)
నాకు english నేర్పిస్తావా? (Will you teach me english?)
తప్పకుండా! (Certainly!)
రోజు నాతో (Daily with me)
15 MIN
practice చేస్తూ (practicing)
త్వరగా english (english quickly)
నేర్చుకోవచ్చు. (you can learn.)
కానీ నా దగ్గర (But I have)
fees కట్టడానికి (to pay fees)
డబ్బు లేదు. (no money.)
కంగారు పడకండి. (Don't worry.)
మీరు కేవలం (You just)
1 RUPEE
మొదలుపెట్టొచ్చు. (can start.)
శుభం. (Great.)
ఎలా join అవ్వాలి? (How to join?)

scenes.setting: Traditional Indian living room with wooden furniture, patterned cushions, and warm lighting.

panels.panel_visual_description: A female-presenting humanoid robot sits cross-legged on a patterned rug in a warmly lit room. The robot features a white and silver metallic body, visible mechanical joints, and bright blue eyes, along with a small black headset. The background is a traditional Indian living room adorned with wooden furniture, patterned cushions, and framed pictures. The lighting is soft and natural, emphasizing the sleek texture of the robot. The robot looks directly at the camera and raises her right hand to point downwards with her index finger. The framing is a medium close-up, focusing on the robot's upper body and gesture. The overall composition is centered and balanced.

scenes.visual_description: The scene transitions to a full-screen view of Character A, the AI robot, in the same living room setting. The robot points downwards towards the bottom of the frame. Dynamic text overlays in Telugu and English appear across the center of the screen, highlighting key phrases from the audio. The MySivi app logo also pops up briefly as an overlay. The composition directs the viewer's attention towards the call to action at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: కిందున్న install button నొక్కండి, MySivi app install చేసుకోండి, మీ english practice మొదలుపెట్టండి. [Click the install button below, install the MySivi app, and start your English practice.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
కిందున్న install (install below)
button నొక్కండి, (click button,)
MySivi
app install చేసుకోండి, (install app,)
మీ english practice (your english practice)
మొదలుపెట్టండి. (start.)

scenes.setting: Abstract digital space with a plain light purple background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A sleek, modern smartphone is displayed against a plain, light purple background. The phone initially appears in a side profile, showcasing its thin metallic edge and camera bump. It then smoothly rotates to face the camera directly. The screen of the phone is completely blank and white. The lighting is even and studio-like, creating soft reflections on the phone's metallic surfaces. The framing is a close-up, keeping the device centered in the shot. There are no characters or other props present in this scene.

scenes.visual_description: The scene shows a full-screen animation of a smartphone against a light purple background. The phone rotates from a side angle to a front-facing position. Text overlays displaying the app name, a description, and an 'Install Now' button appear on the phone's screen. The overall look is clean, modern, and typical of an app download end-card. The focus is entirely on the digital device and the call to action.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: Click on install now and download MySivi app. [Click on install now and download MySivi app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
MySivi
English speaking app
Install Now
